violations.text: Thermometers are lacking in the storefront and storage room refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Thermometers have been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets of the 2-door reach-in in the storage room were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the bottom shelves of the storefront dairy reach-in and the storage room 2-door reach-in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2025

Storage room observed to have a large amount of stock up against the walls. Stock must be away from the walls with space between the U-boats in order to inspect for pest activity. Inspector unable to inspect storage room for pest activity. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2025

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration units (back storage room and storefront reach-ins). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2024
